recommendations.title: Camille
recommendations.overview: A twisted honeymoon adventure about a young couple on their way to Niagara Falls.

recommendations.title: The Week Of
recommendations.overview: The parents of a soon-to-be married couple make the final preparations for the wedding ceremony.

recommendations.title: Warrior
recommendations.overview: The youngest son of an alcoholic former boxer returns home, where he's trained by his father for competition in a mixed martial arts tournament – a path that puts the fighter on a collision course with his estranged, older brother.

recommendations.title: Misericordia
recommendations.overview: Jérémie returns to his hometown for the funeral of his former boss, the village baker. He decides to stay for a few days with Martine, the man's widow. A mysterious disappearance, a threatening neighbor and a priest with strange intentions make Jérém

recommendations.title: The Six Wives of Henry Lefay
recommendations.overview: A presumed-dead man's current wife and former wives squabble over his funeral arrangements.

recommendations.title: Daughters of Darkness
recommendations.overview: Ostend, Belgium. In a decadent seaside hotel, Stefan and Valerie, a newlywed couple, meet the mysterious Countess Báthory and Ilona, her secretary.

recommendations.title: Unhappily Ever After
recommendations.overview: María José and Alfredo are about to celebrate their 20th anniversary and their children give them a trip to the hotel where they celebrated their honeymoon, but a spell will make them repeat the same day.

recommendations.title: Young Adult
recommendations.overview: A divorced writer from the Midwest returns to her hometown to reconnect with an old flame, who's now married with a family.

recommendations.title: The Accountant
recommendations.overview: As a math savant uncooks the books for a new client, the Treasury Department closes in on his activities and the body count starts to rise.

recommendations.title: The Band's Visit
recommendations.overview: A small Egyptian police band travels to Israel to play at the inaugural ceremony of an Arab arts center, only to find themselves stuck in the wrong town.
